name: Cranberry Squares
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Melted Butter or Margarine (cooled slightly)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Butter a 9-inch square baking pan.
3. In a large bowl, beat the sugar and eggs until slightly thickened, about 2 minutes.
4. Beat in the melted butter and almond extract.
5. Add the flour and stir until well blended.
6. Stir in the cranberries and chopped almonds or pecans.
7. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
8. Bake for about 1 hour, or until a tester inserted into the center comes out clean.
9. Allow to cool completely before cutting. If doubling the recipe, use two 9-inch pans (not a 9x13 pan).
